title: Avocado Breeze
description: A tangy and silky Indian-inspired dish featuring avocado as the main ingredient, perfect for a solo dinner or light meal.

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.notes: about the size of your closed fist

instructions: Blend the avocado with lime juice, minced garlic, and a pinch of cumin in a blender or food processor until smooth.
In a small saucepan, heat sesame oil over medium-low heat. Add chopped ginger and sauté for about 30 seconds to wilt slightly.
Gradually pour in the blended avocado mixture into the pan while stirring constantly to prevent lumps.
Stir in turmeric powder until well combined. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for another minute or two, allowing flavors to meld together.
Once done, remove from heat and serve warm over a bed of quinoa or steamed vegetables.
